evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long produced 7 VALID_0DTE trades, $1060.6 PnL, 224.54 PnL/exposure hour, no slow >=12h trades, and worst MAE -346.8, cleaner than pullback_long and charm_pin_pullback_long tails. Prior take-profit compression hurt, so admission quality is the cleaner mechanism.
name: Charm Wall Structure-Confirmed Extension Box
risk: Small-sample edge can be overfit; stricter structure plus a 22-point VWAP cap may remove rare convex winners or cannibalize nothing, yielding lower net profit without MAE improvement.
trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway with price above charm wall, require-breakout true, confirmed ES higher-high/higher-low structure, and ES-VWAP extension below the overextension cap.
validation_metric: Total risk-adjusted score improves versus run_044, total net profit remains >=98% of run_044, charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL/exposure remains >=225, slow_12h stays 0, and global worst MAE does not worsen.
